name: payment-checkout-vietqr
_note: MUTATING + non-deterministic: each run INSERTs a pending payment in both backends. Requires VietQR enabled in app_settings.payment_methods_enabled (CSV must include 'vietqr') and a paid VND plan id. Deterministic + compared: payment.amount, payment.currency='VND', payment.method='vietqr', payment.status='pending', payment.user_id, payment.plan_id, payment.completed_at, payment.provider_ref, payment.notes, and bank_info.{bank_name,account_number,account_name,amount,currency}. completed_at/provider_ref/notes are deterministic null on both backends for a fresh pending row, so they are COMPARED (null==null), NOT ignored. Do NOT add them to ignore_value_of: the gate's ignore-branch requires an ignored key to be present AND non-empty on both sides, so listing a null-on-both key there produces a guaranteed false failure ('must be present+non-empty on both'). Ignored (random/per-request OR not selected by GetPlanForCheckout): id/reference_code/timestamps, qr_data (URL embeds the random reference_code), bank_info.reference (=reference_code), and the nested plan.daily_limit/is_active (Phase 3b GetPlanForCheckout doesn't select those columns — known fixture-documented gap, see the TODO in internal/payment/checkout.go). If Go and Node disagree on any NON-ignored key the gate flags a real parity bug.
